negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_242
prompt: The video opens with a lively nighttime street scene, likely in an urban area decorated for the holidays. The setting is illuminated by streetlights and festive lights strung along the buildings, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. A diverse group of pedestrians is captured mid-stride, walking in opposite directions across the crosswalk. On the left side of the frame, a man in a black jacket, jeans, and a black face mask holds an object wrapped in what appears to be a purple plastic bag as he continues to walk. After a few steps, the man in the face mask turns his face to his left, then right side and hands the object wrapped in the purple bag to a woman with blonde hair and a red checkered-patterned scarf, though her face is not visible in the video. After that, the man in the face mask turns around and heads back into the direction he came from.  Meanwhile, in the center of the frame, three men are walking side by side, equidistant from each other. A man in a white jacket, black pants, and black shoes is followed by two other men. The man right behind the one in the white jacket is wearing a dark blue fleece, black pants, and shoes, scrolling through his phone while walking. Behind him, a man in a burgundy hoodie and camouflage pants walks away from the camera. The background features a mix of modern and older architectural elements, with buildings adorned with blue lights that have an animated text overlay in white letters. The overall scene is dynamic, with people moving in various directions, contributing to the bustling urban environment. As the video progresses, the group of pedestrians continue their journey across the street, maintaining the lively and festive mood established in the first frame.
